# Charls Flowers

> Miami's premier flower shop. Handcrafted rose bouquets (50-200 roses) in natural, glitter, and painted finishes, with AI-powered preview, same-day delivery up to 87 miles, and free in-store pickup at 7261 NW 12th Street, Miami FL 33126. Bilingual English/Spanish.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured collections and same-day delivery.
- [About](/about): Our story, founder and Miami location.
- [Bouquets](/bouquets): Full catalog of rose bouquets by color and finish.
- [Custom Bouquet Builder](/bouquet-builder): Configure color, quantity, finish, paper and extras with AI preview.
- [Room Decors](/room-decors): Floral room decoration packages for proposals and surprises.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on flowers, occasions and Miami delivery.
- [Delivery](/delivery): Zones, pricing and same-day cutoffs.
- [FAQ](/faq): Orders, delivery and customization questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, Instagram and store address.
- [Shipping Policy](/shipping-policy)
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy)

## Business info

- Address: 7261 NW 12th Street, Miami, FL 33126, USA
- Phone: +1 (904) 442-4042
- Email: charls@charlsflowers.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8AM-7PM, Sat 8AM-5PM, Sun closed (America/New_York)
- Same-day delivery: order before 3PM Miami time, up to 87 miles
- Languages: English, Spanish
